calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-appeal-disposition-17 && find data/cases/ca11/68975767 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68975767 --event evt-appeal-disposition-17; find data/cases/ca11/68975767 -maxdepth 10 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/event.yaml; sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json; if [ -d data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/documents ]; then find data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/documents -maxdepth 2 -type f -print -exec sed -n '1,260p' {} \\;; else echo 'NO_PROVISIONED_DOCUMENTS'; fi; sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/f

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '{case_name, date_filed, date_terminated, appellate_case_type_information, appellate_fee_status, appeal_from_str, docket_number, nature_of_suit, jury_demand, parties, entries: [.docket_entries[] | {entry_number,date_filed,description,recap_documents:[.recap_documents[]|{description,plain_text,is_available}]}]}' data/cases/ca11/68975767/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_o

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i \"appeal|disposition|ca11|circuit\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 120; UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -l '^kind: appeal$' data/cases | head -n 12; find data/cases -path '*/events/*/outcome.json' -type f -print | head -n 20","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"for d in data/cases/ca11/66800253/events/evt-appeal-disposition data/cases/ca10/69641076/events/evt-appeal-disposition data/cases/ca10/69566612/events/evt-appeal-disposition data/cases/ca1/30929/events/evt-appeal-disposition; do echo \"$d\"; find \"$d\" -maxdepth 5 -type f -print; done","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"ca11",q:"motion for reconsideration abuse of discretion clear error manifest injustice",filed_before:"2023-07-11",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:5}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca11 --topic '3840 Trademark' --decided-before 2023 --limit 5 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; test -e data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z && find data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data; git status --short; find data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/retrieval.md
@@
-- Attempted a CourtListener opinions search limited to Eleventh Circuit decisions filed before July 11, 2023 for `motion for reconsideration abuse of discretion clear error manifest injustice`. The MCP service returned `REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store` and supplied no r

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"out=data/cases/ca11/68975767/events/evt-appeal-disposition-17/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z; jq -e . \"$out/prediction.json\" \"$out/tooling.json\" \"$out/flags.json\" >/dev/null; find \"$out\" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort; git status --short --untracked-files=all | sed -n '1,120p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)
